leads.outreachMessage: Ms. Moreau, we saw that your property at 950 NE 96th St has an active roof replacement permit following Hurricane Helene, and we wanted to reach out. Many homeowners leave significant insurance money on the table by handling claims alone — Claim Remedy Adjusters works on your behalf to ensure you receive the full payout your policy allows. There's no upfront cost; we only get paid when you do. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Johnson, we noticed your property at 2650 NW 54th St has a structural repair permit on file following Hurricane Helene, and we wanted to connect. Structural damage claims are among the most complex to navigate, and insurance companies routinely underpay without a licensed public adjuster advocating for you. Claim Remedy Adjusters specializes in helping Miami homeowners recover the maximum settlement they're entitled to — at no upfront cost. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Ms. Dunmore, we saw that your property at 321 NW 42nd Ave has an active re-roof permit following Hurricane Helene and wanted to reach out. As licensed public adjusters, Claim Remedy Adjusters helps Miami homeowners ensure their insurance claim covers the full scope of storm-related roof damage — not just what the insurer initially offers. We'd be glad to review your policy and claim at no obligation and no upfront cost. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Fernandez, we noticed your property at 8240 SW 8th St recently filed a hurricane damage repair permit following Hurricane Milton. As licensed public adjusters, Claim Remedy Adjusters specializes in helping Miami homeowners navigate their insurance claims and recover the maximum settlement they're entitled to — at no upfront cost to you. We'd love to review your policy and claim at no obligation. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Ms. Kowalski, we saw that your property at 12301 SW 107th Ave has a flood remediation permit on file following Hurricane Milton and wanted to reach out. Flood damage claims are often undervalued by insurers, especially when hidden water damage isn't fully accounted for — that's where Claim Remedy Adjusters comes in. As licensed public adjusters, we fight to make sure you receive every dollar your policy allows, at no upfront cost to you. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Vega, we noticed your property at 3140 NW 18th Ave has an active roof replacement permit following Hurricane Milton's wind damage. Insurance companies frequently undervalue hurricane wind claims, and having a licensed public adjuster on your side can make a significant difference in your final settlement. Claim Remedy Adjusters works exclusively for homeowners — not insurers — and there is no upfront cost to you. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Ms. Suarez, we saw that your property at 7710 SW 48th St has a water damage repair permit following Hurricane Milton, and we wanted to connect. Flood and water damage claims can be among the hardest to settle fairly, as insurers often dispute the full extent of interior damage. Claim Remedy Adjusters are licensed public adjusters who work on your behalf to document every loss and maximize your payout — at no upfront cost. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Peña, we noticed your property at 5522 NW 7th St recently filed a hurricane damage repair permit following Hurricane Milton. As licensed public adjusters, Claim Remedy Adjusters has helped many Miami homeowners recover significantly more than the insurer's initial offer after hurricane damage — and we do it at no upfront cost to you. We'd welcome the chance to review your claim and make sure nothing is left on the table. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Ms. Clarke, we saw that your property at 1860 SW 27th Ave has a flood damage restoration permit on file following Hurricane Milton and wanted to reach out. Flood restoration claims often involve extensive hidden damage that insurers underestimate in their initial assessment — and that's exactly where Claim Remedy Adjusters can help. We're licensed public adjusters who work solely on your behalf to ensure you receive the full settlement your policy entitles you to, at no upfront cost. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Nguyen, we noticed your property at 14450 SW 8th St has a wind mitigation repair permit following Hurricane Milton and wanted to connect. Many homeowners don't realize their insurance policy may cover more of the repair costs than the insurer initially offers — Claim Remedy Adjusters can review your claim to ensure you're not leaving money behind. We're licensed public adjusters and only get paid when you receive your settlement, so there's no upfront cost to you. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.
